creator: waldeck@gmx.de
text:
I have installed the binary osiris-4.2.1 package.

pkg_info shows following files:

# pkg_info -L osiris-4.2.1   
Information for osiris-4.2.1:

Files:
/usr/local/sbin/osirisd
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/osirisd.sh


But there should be much more files according to:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/osiris/pkg-plist?rev=1.8&content-type=text/x-cvsweb-markup

How-To-Repeat: pkg_info -L osiris-4.2.1
